nodes.label: Phase 3 — the objective reframe (ADOPTED)
nodes.description: P3.0->P3.3, June 2026. Swaps energy-goodness for a contrastive (InfoNCE) objective + cross-layer coordination window, and depth composes (given headroom) while re-earning and improving the continual win. Supersedes energy-goodness as the SCFF objective for draft 6.0.

nodes.label: Phase 3 verdict: contrast+coordination is a strict upgrade over energy-goodness
nodes.description: The recipe [contrast (InfoNCE, two-mask views, temp 0.5) + coordination window w>=2] SCFF bulk + sleep-consolidated readout composes depth given headroom AND improves the continual win (BWT -0.017 vs energy's -0.026). This supersedes energy-goodness Sigma h^2 for draft 6.0.
